module.name: rule-factory
module.description: Shared ESLint RuleCreator factory used by all plugin rules to produce consistently documented rule instances.

scenarios.name: should return a callable rule creator
scenarios.when: createRule is called with a rule definition object
scenarios.then: returns a fully constructed ESLint rule object

scenarios.name: should embed a documentation URL derived from the rule name
scenarios.given: a rule is created with name 'my-rule'
